WILLIS GROUP HOLDINGS LIMITED

ANNUAL REPORT ON FORM 10-K

FOR THE YEAR ENDED DECEMBER 31, 2007

Certain Definitions

The following definitions apply throughout this annual report unless the context requires otherwise:

"Company or Group or Willis"   Willis Group Holdings Limited and its subsidiaries.
"Companies Act"   The Companies Act 1981 of Bermuda, as amended.
"Shares"   The shares of common stock of Willis Group Holdings Limited, par value $0.000115 per share.
"Willis Group Holdings"   Willis Group Holdings Limited.
